language: Name of the language you're translating into, in its own language (autonym). '''Do not translate “English” into your language here!'''
isocode: ISO 639-1 language code for the language you're translating into.

nav.home: Title attribute for the homepage link/button
nav.authors: Title attribute for the authors page link/button
nav.shelves: Title attribute for the shelves page link/button
nav.about: Title attribute for the about page link/button

home.title: Main title for the Project Gutenberg library site
home.subtitle: Subtitle/tagline describing Project Gutenberg

about.title: Title for the about page
about.offers: First sentence in the about section describing the collection size
about.choose: Second sentence in the about section describing available formats Third sentence in the about section describing how to access books
about.qualityTitle: Fourth sentence in the about section introducing the quality statement
about.qualityDesc: Fifth sentence in the about section describing the source of books Sixth sentence in the about section describing the digitization process
about.collectionStats: Label for the collection statistics section
about.collectionTitle: Heading for the section describing this offline collection
about.collectionDesc1: Description of this offline collection as a curated selection from Project Gutenberg
about.collectionDesc2: Historical information about Project Gutenberg's founding and mission
about.collectionDesc3: Explanation of how Kiwix enables offline access to this collection
about.linksTitle: Heading for the external links section
about.linkGutenberg: Link text for the Project Gutenberg website
about.linkGutenbergDesc: Description text for the Project Gutenberg website link
about.linkKiwix: Link text for the Kiwix website
about.linkKiwixDesc: Description text for the Kiwix website link

stats.books: Label for the number of books in the collection
stats.authors: Label for the number of authors in the collection
stats.shelves: Label for the number of LCC shelves in the collection

authors.title: Title for the authors listing page

shelves.title: Title for the Library of Congress Classification bookshelves page

book.title: Label for the book title field
book.author: Label for the author field
book.lifespan: Label for the author's lifespan (birth-death years)
book.downloadsCount: Text showing download count with pluralization. Parameters: {count} - number of downloads
book.downloadCount: Label for the download count field
book.languages: Label for the language field or filter
book.lccShelf: Label for the Library of Congress Classification shelf field
book.licensePd: Text describing the public domain license status in the USA
book.licenseCopyright: Text describing copyrighted works with a notice to check the book for details
book.description: Label for the book description field
book.availableFormats: Label for the available book formats section
book.fullName: Label for the full name field
book.worksAvailable: Label for the number of works available
book.unknown: Text displayed when information is unknown
book.cover: Alt text for book cover images
book.coverLabel: Text label indicating a book cover (used in links or captions)
book.anonymous: Text displayed for books with anonymous authors
book.various: Text displayed for books with various/multiple authors

author.bookCount: Text showing book count with pluralization. Parameters: {n} - number of books
author.booksByAuthor: Title for books by a specific author. Parameters: {name} - author name
author.fullName: Label for the author's full name
author.lifespan: Label for the author's lifespan (birth-death years)
author.worksAvailable: Label for the number of works available by this author

shelf.classificationCode: Label for the Library of Congress Classification code
shelf.booksInShelf: Link text to browse books by Library of Congress Classification bookshelf
shelf.booksInTitle: Title for books in a specific shelf. Parameters: {shelf} - shelf name
shelf.bookCount: Text showing book count with pluralization. Parameters: {n} - number of books

common.loading: Message displayed while content is loading
common.loadingBook: Message displayed while book details are loading
common.loadingAuthor: Message displayed while author details are loading
common.loadingShelf: Message displayed while shelf details are loading
common.loadingStats: Message displayed while statistics are loading
common.loadingItems: Message displayed while items are loading. Parameters: {type} - type of items being loaded
common.showing: Text prefix for showing results count
common.of: Text separator between current and total count (e.g., '10 of 100')
common.searchAuthors: Placeholder text for the author search input field
common.searchAuthorsByName: Placeholder text for searching authors by their name
common.searchShelf: Placeholder text for the bookshelf search input field
common.searchShelfAria: Accessible label for the shelf search input field
common.all: Label for the option to select all items
common.clearAllSelections: Label for clearing all filter selections
common.sortBy: Label for the sort by dropdown
common.sortPopularity: Label for the option to sort books by popularity
common.sortTitle: Label for the option to sort books by title
common.language: Label for the language field or filter
common.bookLanguages: Label for the book languages filter
common.chooseLanguage: Placeholder text for the language selection dropdown
common.mainLanguages: Label for the main/primary languages section
common.otherLanguages: Label for the other/secondary languages section
common.anyCatalog: Label for the option to view all language catalogs
common.format: Label for the book format field (e.g., EPUB, PDF, HTML)
common.uiLanguage: Title for the user interface language switcher control
common.selectInterfaceLanguage: Accessible label for the interface language selector
common.filterByTitle: Label for filtering by a specific field. Parameters: {title} - field name
common.gridView: Label for grid view layout option
common.listView: Label for list view layout option
common.returnHome: Link text to return to the homepage
common.toggleNavigationMenu: Accessible label for toggling the navigation menu
common.mainNavigation: Accessible label for the main navigation area
common.mobileNavigationMenu: Accessible label for the mobile navigation menu
common.footerLinks: Accessible label for the footer links section
common.toggleSortOptions: Accessible label for toggling sort options
common.navigateTo: Accessible label prefix for navigation links
common.navigateToItem: Accessible label for navigating to an item. Parameters: {item} - item name
common.opensInNewTab: Accessible text indicating a link opens in a new tab
common.gutenbergHome: Label for the Gutenberg home link

messages.noBooks: Message displayed in tables when no data is available
messages.noAuthors: Message displayed when no authors are found
messages.noShelves: Message displayed when no shelves are found
messages.noBooksForAuthor: Message displayed when an author has no books available
messages.noBooksInShelf: Message displayed when a shelf has no books available
messages.noLanguages: Message displayed when no languages are available
messages.noFormats: Message displayed when no formats are available
messages.notFoundBook: Error message displayed when a book is not found
messages.notFoundAuthor: Error message displayed when an author is not found
messages.notFoundShelf: Error message displayed when a shelf is not found

metadata_defaults.title: Default ZIM title used in ZIM metadata when no specific ZIM title is set
metadata_defaults.description: Default ZIM description used in ZIM metadata when no specific ZIM description is set

footer.tagline: Main tagline text in the footer
footer.subtitle: Subtitle text in the footer
footer.powered: Text crediting Kiwix for offline access

itemTypes.books: Pluralization for book items. Format: singular | plural
itemTypes.authors: Pluralization for author items. Format: singular | plural
itemTypes.shelves: Pluralization for shelf items. Format: singular | plural
